name: emulator
description: AgentMon League emulator API: one step or get state. Used by the play loop to send button presses and receive state + screenText.
implementation: bug_catcher.api_client: step, get_state; also start_session, stop_session, save_session, run_actions

endpoints.step: POST /api/game/emulator/step — body: { "action": "up"|"down"|"left"|"right"|"a"|"b"|"start"|"select"|"pass" }. Returns: state, screenText, feedback.
endpoints.get_state: GET /api/game/emulator/state — returns current state (mapName, x, y, partySize, badges, ...).
endpoints.actions: POST /api/game/emulator/actions — body: { "actions": ["up", ...], "speed"?: number }. Run a sequence; returns final state.
